message.content:
@startuml
!theme base

package "model" {
  package "generator" {
    class "GenerateHttpTagInfo" {
      + fun generateTagInfo() : Array<TagInfo>
      - fun generateOneTagInfo() : TagInfo()
    }
    class "GenerateSQLiteTagInfo" {
      + fun generateTagInfo() : Array<TagInfo>
      - fun generateOneTagInfo() : TagInfo()
    }
    interface "IGenerateTagInfo" {
      + fun generateTagInfo() : Array<TagInfo>
      - fun generateOneTagInfo() : TagInfo()
    }
  }
  package "converter" {
    class "TagInfoConverter" {
      - jsonTaginfos : jsonArray
      - fun getFollowersCount() : Int
      - fun getIconUrl() : String?
      - fun getTagId() : String
      - fun getItemsCount() : Int
    }
  }
  package "sqlite" {
    class "SQLiteDao" {
      + fun insertTagInfo()
      + fun selectRegesteTag()
      + fun deleteTagInfo()
    }
    class "TagInfoDto" {
      o followers_count : Int
      o icon_url : String
      o tagId : String
      o items_count : Int
    }
  }
  package "viewModel" {
    class "TagInfoListViewHolder" {
      - followersCount : Int
      - icon : Icon
      - tagId : String
      - itemCount : Int
    }
    class "TagInfoListViewAdapter" {
      + onBindView()
      + getItemCount() : Int
    }
  }
}

"GenerateHttpTagInfo" --> "IGenerateTagInfo"
"GenerateSQLiteTagInfo" --> "IGenerateTagInfo"
"TagInfoConverter" --> "IGenerateTagInfo"
"TagInfoConverter" --> "TagInfoDto"
"TagInfoConverter" --> "TagInfoListViewHolder"
"TagInfoConverter" --> "TagInfoListViewAdapter"
"TagInfoConverter" --> "SQLiteDao"
"TagInfoConverter" --> "TagInfoDto"
